prompt: A stylized ANIMATED-FILM skyline of London — NOT photorealistic. Painterly semi-3D animated-film matte painting (Pixar / Disney semi-3D look): soft volumetric light, gentle hand-painted brush texture, clean shapes, smooth gradients, rich atmospheric depth. ELEVATED WIDE SKYLINE PANORAMA from a high distant vantage point across the city — NOT street level, nothing close to the camera at ground level. Scene: the London skyline along the River Thames at night — Big Ben and the Houses of Parliament, the London Eye, The Shard, Tower Bridge and St Paul's dome as bold elegant silhouettes. STRICT COLOR PALETTE to match a sleek high-performance motorsport emblem: deep matte BLACK and charcoal sky and city, with vivid glowing PAPAYA-ORANGE neon light accents rimming the buildings and reflecting on the dark river — high-tech, premium, performance mood. FRUIT FEATURE: a few oversized dreamlike glossy BERRIES (blackberries and raspberries in deep berry-purple and magenta, catching warm orange rim-light) softly floating and nestled into the scene, stylized and tastefully integrated, gently glowing. Wide cinematic 16:9 composition. Absolutely NO text, NO words, NO logos, NO badges, NO frames or borders.
